acceptance_criteria.criterion: criteria-plan preserves multi-line bullet criteria by joining continuation lines into the same criterion text for both must-have/current-task and follow-up/deferred sections.

evidence.diff_evidence: tests add multiline must-have/current-task and deferred/follow-up parser coverage; parser accumulates indented continuation lines before suggestion creation.

acceptance_criteria.proof: Worker transcript task_complete says multi-line bullet items accumulate indented continuation lines; focused criteria-plan tests passed (8 tests), full unittest discover passed (341 tests), and direct Gate 5 parse returned accepted, accepted, accepted, deferred with wrapped text preserved.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: The parser only joins clear continuation prose under an active list item and does not convert unrelated prose, headings, or separate list items into the prior criterion.

evidence.implementation: _INDENTED_CONTINUATION_RE matches only indented non-empty continuation lines; flush_active_item runs before headings, new list items, blank lines, and unrelated prose.

acceptance_criteria.proof: Git diff shows the parser only appends lines matching indented continuation while flushing on blank lines, headings, unrelated prose, and new list items. Transcript shows focused tests passed, including multiline and Gate 5 wrapped prose coverage.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Deferred suggestions still receive the default deferred rationale, accepted suggestions do not, and existing single-line extraction behavior is preserved.
acceptance_criteria.proof: Diff preserves _make_suggestion rationale behavior: deferred suggestions receive DEFAULT_DEFERRED_RATIONALE and accepted suggestions receive None. Tests assert accepted rationale is None, deferred rationale is DEFAULT_DEFERRED_RATIONALE, and existing single-line separated criteria behavior still passes.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: criteria-plan remains read-only: running it does not create or mutate acceptance_criteria, events, or commands rows.

evidence.read_only_evidence: No command/database mutation path changed; parser-only diff plus tests. Focused passing set includes test_criteria_plan_cli_json_drafts_commands_without_mutation.

acceptance_criteria.proof: Worker transcript final receipt says criteria-plan remains read-only and no command/database mutation path changed. Diff is limited to parser and tests; existing CLI read-only mutation test remained in the focused passing set.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Broaden criteria-plan parsing for nested sub-bullets or richer Markdown structure if managers need to preserve indentation/structure rather than flattened criterion text.
Add fixture-based regression coverage from more real dogfood transcripts if additional truncation shapes appear beyond the Gate 5-style wrapped prose.

criteria_negotiation.prompt: Please propose 2-4 acceptance criteria for the current slice. Split them into must-have current-task criteria and follow-up criteria. Include the verification you expect for each.
suggested_actions: Ask the worker to split must-have current-task criteria from follow-up criteria.
Record accepted current-task criteria with workerctl criteria dogfood-criteria-plan-multiline --add --criterion "..." --source worker_proposed --status accepted.
Record proposed current-task criteria with workerctl criteria dogfood-criteria-plan-multiline --add --criterion "..." --source worker_proposed --status proposed.
Record follow-up criteria with workerctl criteria dogfood-criteria-plan-multiline --add --criterion "..." --source worker_proposed --status deferred.

acceptance_criteria: Current-task acceptance criteria are recorded before completion and deferred follow-ups are separated with rationale.
criteria-plan correctly preserves multi-line bullet criteria under current-task and follow-up headings.
criteria-plan remains read-only and does not mutate acceptance_criteria, events, or commands.
Focused and full unit tests pass, or any test limitation is recorded with exact output.
guidelines: Do not merge PRs, do not switch away from branch dogfood-criteria-plan-multiline, and do not perform destructive cleanup.
When criteria are proposed, use criteria-plan as a draft only; record reviewed accepted/deferred criteria manually if needed.
Nudge only when durable state shows the worker is blocked, stale, missing criteria, or needs a concrete next action.
manager_config.objective: Manage the worker through a low-risk meaningful branch-scoped fix for criteria-plan multi-line criteria extraction. Ensure emergent acceptance criteria are recorded before accepting completion, and require proof from tests and replay/export before finish.
